ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "noc" TEXT /* National Olympic Committee code */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_noc FOREIGN KEY ("noc") REFERENCES noc ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "noc" (
  "noc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NOC */,
  "code" TEXT /* NOC code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NOC */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the NOC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "noc" TEXT /* Reference to the NOC */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_noc FOREIGN KEY ("noc") REFERENCES noc ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic edition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the athlete
Unique identifier for each participation record
Rank of the athlete in the event
Unique identifier for each membership record
